h1: Best Dynamic Programming Questions for Apple
intro: A curated set of 4 Dynamic Programming problems frequently useful for Apple interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many Dynamic Programming problems should I do for Apple?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 4 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the Dynamic Programming topic page and related roadmaps.
